title: Single-port Express server (SPA+API+SSE+WS) with PORT env; no extra processes
SPA fallback routing (no blank screens); index.html for non-API routes
Top-level crash boundaries (uncaughtException/unhandledRejection) → log + entropy counter + continue
/healthz and /readyz gates (seeds loaded + scheduler started) and block UI until ready
Compression + CORS + Helmet (CSP relaxed) + trust proxy for Replit ingress
Cooperative scheduler tick (1s) for all jobs; single process only
KV (Replit DB) + SQLite hybrid adapter behind one interface (feature-flag switch)
Snapshot on graceful shutdown + daily snapshot cron with retention (last 7)
Admin bearer guard (ADMIN_TOKEN) for all mutating routes; reject unauthenticated writes
Per-IP token-bucket rate limiter on write routes; bounded burst; hard cap
Pino logger (pretty dev / JSON prod); in-memory ring buffer ≤2MB → rotate to KV
Entropy index (0..1) from error ratio & queue backlog; throttle when high
Budget module (daily allowance, per-job weights, warn@70%, hard@90% backoff)
SSE /events keepalive (15s) + compact frames; WS /ws hub with <1KB frames
Degraded-mode banners (seed/build/budget) explain paused features; never blank
replit.nix pins Node 20, Python 3.11, sqlite, git; reproducible environment
TypeScript config (ES2020, bundler resolution, source maps, skipLibCheck)
Zod schemas: Directive, Anchor, Budget, Event, PU (Proposal Unit) with coercion
Global JSON sanitizer + body limit (256KB) + timeouts on all routes
shared/format.ts: safeNumber, safeLocaleNumber, safePercent, safeJSON
Postinstall installs client deps; build script degrades to server-only if client fails
scripts/seed.ts idempotent loader for Codex/Anchors/Budget from /data
scripts/snapshot.ts & scripts/compact.ts to prune logs/events older than 24h
/api/ops/queue accepts NDJSON PUs (Refactor/Test/Doc/Perf/UX/Feature/Seal)
PU executor with budget-aware throttling + dry-run mode toggle
/api/ops/reindex rebuilds indices/caches; emits Msg⛛ summary frame
/api/export & /api/import (NDJSON) with automatic snapshot before import
/api/hints suggests low-hanging fruit from drift/budget/state inspections
Admin Console (hidden without token): seed/snapshot/compact/import/export/reindex
Msg⛛ event log (UTC, module, delta, rune id) shown in HUD footer
Fixed-timestep sim (e.g., 250ms); accumulate real time; absorb jitter deterministically
Global game clock (monotonic); pause; speed multipliers (1x/2x/5x)
Deterministic RNG with per-run seed; reproducible tests and fixtures
Save/Load snapshot with schema versioning; migration runner on boot
Autosave every N ticks; manual save with checksum; UI indicator
Resource registry: id, label, baseCap, visibleWhen, tags
Production unit model: cost curve, outputs, upkeep, unlock gates
Optional clicker hook with fatigue curve anti-spam (QoL starter)
Generators produce per tick; caps; overflow → waste log
Sinks/consumers (crafting/processing) with FIFO/batch recipes
Storage upgrades; soft cap past 90% with diminishing returns
Unlock tree by totals/achievements; show next two hints only
Automation flags: manual / semi / auto per unit; UI toggles
Energy/heat budget layer bounding combinatorics; consumption model
Idle-while-closed: approximate offline gains with cap and audit
Cost escalator (poly/exponential hybrid) with anti-inflation clamps
Global multipliers: research/artifacts/prestige; stacking rules
Tiered resource bands (Tier-0→Tier-N); visible strata in UI
Prestige loop: soft reset → meta-currency; clean preview & bookkeeping
Prestige upgrades tree (permanent bonuses / QoL unlocks)
Achievements w/ score; minor multipliers or cosmetics
Time-to-next goal estimator; ETA chips near key buttons
Anti-grind floor: guarantee progress every X minutes at low states
Challenge mutators: higher reward, variant rules
Daily/weekly rituals producing meta-currency
Routes: / (HUD), /game, /agents, /ops, /anchors, /settings
ASCII Pantheon HUD: Stability/Entropy/Vibe/Last Msg⛛ + panes
Resource bar with caps, tick rates, trend arrows, tooltips
Buildings panel (buy/upgrade/auto), queue and receipts
Research tree (fog reveal), keyboard nav, zoom to node
Prestige screen with projection and irreversible confirm UX
Event log with filters (economy/system/agent/lore)
Accessibility AA+: contrast, focus rings, reduced motion toggle
Virtualized lists for 200+ rows; frame budget ≤250ms updates
Tutorial overlay (coach marks) tied to unlocks and mistakes
Agent bus (event-driven) reading deltas; propose game actions
Self-play harness: policy hooks so game can play itself (bounded)
Agent-plays-game macros (buy N, research X when feasible)
Game-plays-agents scenarios (cap-full, low-energy, misbalance)
Council registry (roles: Tinkerer/Archivist/Medic/…) with votes
NDJSON GamePU translator: {action: BUY|RESEARCH, node: id}
ChatDev profiles + launchers (scaffold/test/doc pipelines)
Hints engine from metrics (stalls, wastes) → next best action
Sandbox branches agent/* for autonomous PRs (bounded) with countersign
Rate-limit agent actions per minute; cooldowns and audit
Telemetry counters: tick time, queue depth, FPS (local only)
Economy probe: yield/tick by unit/resource; CSV exporter
Balance snapshot (costs/outputs/caps) → notebooks_lab/
'Why stalled?' inspector: bottleneck (cap, prereq, energy)
Soft-cap & overflow dashboard; inefficiency heatmap
Offline gain estimator validation harness; error < 5%
Unit tests: resources, generators, sinks, escalator math
Integration: buy→produce→sink; e2e happy path
Determinism: fixed seed → identical outputs across runs
Chaos: crash mid-tick; restore consistent state
Load: 10 agents proposing PUs; no runaway CPU/mem
Prompt-regression harness if LLM bridge active
Save migration tests across 3 versions; no data loss
UI keyboard-only traversal reaches all widgets
Budget tests: warn/hard thresholds trigger backoff
Content registry JSON → Zod schema → hot-reload (dev)
Jupyter notebooks for cost/yield curve fitting
Pandas analysis of pacing; plot time-to-feature curves
Export/import content packs (mods) with version lock
Obsidian vault sync for lore/ADRs/economy notes

How agents help: capabilities, limits, safety rails
Frame budget monitor; heavy charts under idle callback
Virtualized ops/codex tables; sticky headers
Event coalescing: batch HUD frames to ≤4/sec under load
Memory cap enforcement: rotate old events/logs to persistence
Reduce motion, font scaling, colorblind palettes
Minimal SFX (buy/upgrade/prestige/achievement) with mute
Tiny chiptune loop (low CPU), pause on unfocus (opt-in)
Retro CRT/scanline CSS theme toggle without hurting readability
Micro-animations via CSS transforms; idle-friendly
